portal.doctorSubtitle: Your schedule, patients you treat, and visit documentation
portal.patientSubtitle: Appointments, your dentist, and visit costs in one place

language.preferenceHint: Your choice is saved to your account.

adminSettings.title: Organization settings
adminSettings.intro: Configure defaults for every signed-in user. Individual users can still pick their own display language in the header.
adminSettings.defaultLanguageHelp: Used when a user has not chosen a personal language. New accounts and the sign-in page follow this default once loaded from the server.

adminProfile.title: Your account
adminProfile.intro: Signed-in user from the auth service. Open your profile anytime from the round avatar in the header.

home.title: Home
home.intro: Next on your calendar, quick navigation, and practice metrics below for the period you select.
home.noDoctorWarning: Your login email must match a doctor in the clinic directory to see your schedule and metrics. Use a seeded doctor account from the project README.
home.noUpcoming: No upcoming visits as primary doctor.

stats.metricsIntro: Counts and revenue for visits where you are the primary dentist, for the period you choose. Revenue uses treatment lines on completed visits only.
stats.metricsNoDoctor: Metrics appear when your account is linked to a clinic doctor record.
stats.legendPart2: includes scheduled, confirmed, in progress, and rescheduled visits in range (not completed, cancelled, or no-show).
stats.statRevenueSub: From recorded treatments on completed visits

appointments.title: Visits
appointments.loadError: Could not load data. Try again.
appointments.noClinicTitle: No clinic profile for this login
appointments.noClinicBody: Use a doctor email registered in the clinic service (see README seed users).
appointments.subtitle: {count} as your primary visits · Dr. {name}

modal.noPatients: No patients loaded. Ensure the patients service is running and you have access to the patient list.
modal.statusHint: Use Confirmed when the patient has already agreed to this slot.
modal.errCreate: Could not create appointment. Check inputs and try again.

detail.noClinicDoctor: No clinic doctor profile for your account.
detail.wrongPrimary: You can only record treatments for appointments where you are the primary doctor.
detail.statusFlowHint: Flow: scheduled → confirmed → in progress → completed; cancel or no-show if the visit does not finish as planned.
detail.confirmRemove: Remove this treatment line from the appointment?
detail.errSaveTreatment: Could not save treatment. Try again.

patients.title: Patients
patients.linkDoctorHint: Link your login to a clinic doctor record to see patients you treat.
patients.listIntro: Everyone with at least one visit where you are the primary dentist.
patients.emptyBefore: No patients yet. Book a visit from

patientDetail.noAccess: You do not have any appointments with this patient as their primary doctor.
patientDetail.demographicsMissing: Demographics not loaded; visit list with you is still available below.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.intro: Your primary visits only. Each block is tinted by status. Use Month for workload overview, Week for the diary grid, Day for an ordered list.
calendar.noDoctor: Link your login to a clinic doctor record to see your schedule.
calendar.dayTip: Tip: Month shows density at a glance; Week splits the diary by day; Day is a simple list.

profile.title: Your account
profile.intro: Login identity for the portal. Clinical scheduling and patients use your clinic doctor record (matched by email). Open this page from the avatar in the header.

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.intro: What matters for your care: who you are on file, who is seeing you next, and what has been billed to the visit so far.
dashboard.profileError: We could not load your profile.
dashboard.noUpcoming: No upcoming visits. When the clinic schedules you, they will show here with your dentist and any recorded costs after treatment.
dashboard.subtotalNote: Subtotals above are from treatments already posted to those visits. Final statements may come from the front desk.

appointmentsPage.title: Your visits
appointmentsPage.intro: See who you are scheduled with, manage upcoming visits, and review recorded treatment costs.
appointmentsPage.loadError: Failed to load appointments. Please try again later.
appointmentsPage.empty: You have no visits on file yet.

list.upcomingHelp: Your dentist, visit status, and any treatment totals already posted for that appointment.
list.pastHelp: Completed or past-dated visits and recorded treatment amounts when available.

card.noCostPast: No treatments recorded for this visit.
card.noCostUpcoming: Costs appear after your visit when the clinic posts treatments.
card.helpFull: Accept confirms your attendance. Reschedule picks a new time (may need clinic confirmation). Cancel marks the visit as cancelled.
card.helpCompact: Accept, reschedule, or cancel this visit.
card.cancelConfirm: Cancel this appointment? The clinic will see it as cancelled.
card.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
card.errPickTime: Choose a new date and time.
card.errFuture: Pick a future date and time.
card.rescheduleIntro: Choose a new date and time. Status will return to "Scheduled" until the clinic confirms.

profilePage.title: Your details
profilePage.introBefore: Contact information and health notes your care team uses. Appointments and costs live under
profilePage.loadError: Could not load your details. Please try again.

profileView.emailHint: Used to sign in; change via clinic if needed.
profileView.healthNotesTitle: Health notes for your care team
profileView.healthNotesEmpty: None on file — add anything your dentist should know (allergies, conditions, medications).

profileForm.title: Edit your details
profileForm.intro: Update what the front desk and clinical team should use to reach you and document your care.
profileForm.healthNotes: Health notes for your care team
profileForm.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.
